title: Fireball Charge
description: Allows you to throw fireballs like in BedWars.
body:
# **Drqad's Charged Fireballs**  
This plugin allows you to throw fireballs with right-click, like a ghast or in BedWars. It‚Äôs simple and configurable.  

**Note:** This plugin was made for Spigot API 21 (MC: 1.21) and Java 21 so it will NOT work on older Versions.

You can customize:
- the explosion power  
- the fireball speed  
- the damage  
- the knockback  
- the cooldown  
  
(There is no limit to those on my end)

There is also a permission check if you only want certain users to use it.

**Permissions:**  
`simplefireball.use`  
‚Üí Allows you to use `/simplefireball reload`

`simplefireball.reload`  
‚Üí Allows you to reload the config

`simplefireball.throw`  
‚Üí Required to throw fireballs if permission check is enabled
